Data Fields

utf8_string_t Struct Reference

Data Fields

struct utf8_string_t * next
 Next string in the bucket.
char data []
 Variable size array holding the string data.

Detailed Description

String in the (Java class file modified) UTF8 format

The string data can be both in the plain UTF8 format or in its Java class file variation, the string manager doesn't care about it, only the conversion functions do. The ones going from the Java class file modified format start with the jutf8_ prefix, the ones working on plain UTF8 strings begin with the utf8_ prefix. Note that the structure holds only a pointer to the next object in the hash table, and the data array is used as a C89-compatible variable size array.

Definition at line 46 of file utf8_string.c.
